label: Total Population
deltaNote: Net population loss in 2024 — 9th consecutive year of decline

label: Nominal GDP (USD)
deltaNote: Slipped from 3rd to 4th largest economy in 2023 due to yen weakness

label: Government Debt / GDP
deltaNote: Highest among G7; ~88% held domestically by Japanese institutions

label: Total Fertility Rate
source: Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare, 2024
deltaNote: Record low; 686,061 births in 2024 — lowest since records began

label: Defense Budget (FY2024)
deltaNote: Targeted to reach 2.0% of GDP by FY2027 under 2022 National Security Strategy

label: Annual CPI Inflation
deltaNote: Japan ended 25-year deflationary era; BOJ raised rates for first time since 2007

label: Unemployment Rate
deltaNote: Near full employment; among the lowest rates in the OECD

label: Trade Balance (2024)
deltaNote: Historic shift from surplus nation; energy imports and weak yen key drivers
